title: Auto Cleaner
description: This is a Simple Plugin that cleans items on the ground from the server every x amounts of minutes
body:
Auto Cleaner is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that keeps your world tidy by automatically removing dropped items not on a configurable whitelist. Every few minutes, it scans the ground and vanishes unwanted clutter—leaving only the treasures you choose to protect.
Customize the cleanup interval, toggle broadcast messages, and define exactly which items are safe from removal. Whether you're running a survival server, a minigame hub, or a mythic realm of chaos, Auto Cleaner helps maintain order without lifting a finger.
Includes a simple /cleanser reload command to update settings on the fly. No bloated features, no lag—just clean code and clean worlds.
Crafted for server admins who value performance, control, and a touch of cinematic flair
~~~~
